event: Cutting a pork carcass in a barn interior
description: A dark barn interior illuminated by soft light from a doorway and window at center. A large animal carcass hangs from the rafters at left, its pale flesh catching the light. A figure bends over a bucket or basin at right while two smaller seated figures rest nearby on the floor. Various tools and household objects are scattered around the dimly lit space. The thatched roof and rough timber beams frame the scene from above.
